B-01.evidence: useStoragePersist.ts L16-25 ALL_KEYS array includes 'sorting' (L17). Save path L135-146 useEffect deps include `state.sorting` (L138) → state change triggers saveRef.current() → debouncedSave (L105-123) → serializeGridState includes sorting in URLSearchParams envelope → setItem. Hydration path L71-101: getItem → JSON.parse → version check → deserializeGridState → onHydrate called with partial including sorting. useStoragePersist.test.ts T2 (L122-143) asserts `arg.sorting === sorting` on mount with valid envelope. Storybook story (stories.tsx L68-75 toggleSort + L100 button + L113 state display) demonstrates sorting persist + reload restoration.

B-02.evidence: useStoragePersist.ts L16-25 ALL_KEYS includes 'columnFilters' (L18). Save deps L138-145 include `state.columnFilters` (L139). serializeGridState writes columnFilters to envelope when non-default. Storybook story toggleFilter (stories.tsx L78-82) demonstrates filter persist. Filter flows through same save+hydration pipeline as sorting.

B-03.evidence: useStoragePersist.ts L16-25 ALL_KEYS includes 'pagination' (L20).
